entity.summary: Fantom automated-market-maker decentralized exchange designed around fee mining, swap referrals, customizable fees, token swaps, and liquidity pools.
entity.notes: DefiLlama continues to classify Excalibur as an audited Fantom AMM and reports current TVL, but current trading-volume evidence is weak and a stable first-party application response was not fully verified during this pass. HEI therefore uses limited status and live_unverified URL status rather than overstating active public trading access.

evidence.title: Excalibur application endpoint
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party application domain is preserved, but the endpoint was not fully verified as an open live trading surface in this review pass.

evidence.title: Excalibur protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Excalibur as an audited Fantom AMM with fee mining, swap referrals, customizable fees, and current TVL.

evidence.title: Excalibur DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently preserves Excalibur as a DEX entity; limited status reflects current evidence quality rather than historical classification alone.
